channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Money-Saving Advice from an Efficiency Specialist
Procalcitonin use in neonatal late-onset sepsis may cut antibiotic duration without raising mortality
item.description: 1. Using procalcitonin to guide decisions in neonatal late-onset sepsis management significantly shortened antibiotic therapy without increasing mortality.

item.title: Paying for Emergency Care Without Insurance
10 Strategies to Reduce Prescription and Treatment Costs
item.description: Healthcare costs are at record highs and climbing. Follow these steps to maximize the value of every dollar you spend.
